Explore Our Energy-Saving LED Bulbs: The Smart Choice for Lighting

Welcome to the ultimate destination for high-quality, energy-saving LED bulbs! At Ledsone, we believe in providing lighting solutions that not only brighten your space but also significantly reduce your electricity bills and environmental footprint. Our extensive collection features a diverse range of LED bulbs designed to meet every aesthetic and functional need, from vintage-inspired filaments to modern globe designs, and everything in between.

LED technology has revolutionized how we light our homes and businesses. Offering superior longevity, instant-on brightness, and incredible energy efficiency compared to traditional incandescent or halogen bulbs, making the switch to LED is a smart investment. Dive into our hand-picked selections to discover the perfect LED bulb for every corner of your life.

LED E27 Globe Vintage Dimmable Bulbs (G95 & G125, 4W & 8W, Warm & Cool White)

Step into a world where classic design meets modern efficiency with our E27 Globe Vintage LED Bulbs. These dimmable beauties, available in popular G95 and G125 sizes, offer a delightful blend of retro charm and advanced LED technology. Whether you prefer the crisp brightness of Cool White or the inviting warmth, these bulbs create the perfect ambiance while saving energy.

10 pack G125 E27 8W Dimmable Globe Vintage LED Retro Light Bulb

High-effect, energy-saving LED lights with a long lifespan. Designed with a standard E27 socket for simple installation and 360-degree beam angle. Perfect for decorative illumination in bars, parties, and various public or home areas, offering eco-friendly lighting without mercury or lead.

10 Pack G95 E27 8W LED Globe Vintage LED Retro Light Bulbs

These energy-efficient LED bulbs feature an E27 socket and a 360-degree beam, ensuring soft, pervasive lighting. Ideal for creating a warm ambiance in homes, hotels, or restaurants, they boast smart IC chips for steady, instant illumination and a lifespan of over 24,000 hours.

4W LED Bulb E27 G95 Globe Vintage LED Retro Bulbs 10 Pack

A 10-pack of high-effect, energy-saving G95 E27 4W LED bulbs with a 360-degree beam angle. These vintage-style bulbs are perfect for decorative illumination in various settings, from bars to showrooms, offering long-lasting and eco-friendly lighting.

FAQs for Globe Vintage LED Bulbs

What makes these E27 Globe Vintage LED Bulbs ideal for decorative lighting?

These bulbs combine classic globe shapes with modern LED filament technology, offering a vintage aesthetic while providing efficient and customizable lighting. Their dimmable feature and choice of warm or cool white tones allow for versatile ambiance creation in any space, from cosy living rooms to stylish cafes. The G125 and G95 sizes offer significant visual presence. Explore our G125 E27 8W Dimmable Globe Vintage LED Bulbs for a perfect blend of style and efficiency.

Are these LED bulbs compatible with all E27 fixtures?

Yes, all LED bulbs in this section feature a standard E27 screw base, making them directly compatible with most existing E27 light fixtures. Installation is simple, allowing for an easy upgrade to energy-efficient and stylish lighting without needing special adapters.

How do the dimmable features enhance the user experience?

The dimmable functionality of these globe LED bulbs provides ultimate control over your lighting. You can adjust the brightness to suit any mood or activity, from bright task lighting to a soft, ambient glow. This flexibility not only enhances comfort but also contributes to greater energy savings by only using the light you need.

LED E27 ST64 Filament Dimmable Bulbs (4W & 8W, Warm White)

Embrace the timeless appeal of filament lighting with our ST64 E27 Dimmable LED Bulbs. These 'Edison style' bulbs evoke a sense of nostalgia with their visible filaments and amber glass, yet they boast all the benefits of modern LED technology. Available in both 4W and 8W, they provide a beautiful warm white light, perfect for creating an inviting atmosphere in any vintage or industrial-themed setting.

10-Pack E27 LED Edison Bulbs – Dimmable Vintage Amber Glass

This 10-pack of ST64 E27 8W vintage LED bulbs combines retro style with energy efficiency. Featuring a 360-degree beam angle and smart IC chip, these dimmable bulbs offer soft, steady warm white light for bars, hotels, dining rooms, and decorative home illumination.

10 x ST64 E27 4W Vintage Antique Retro Edison Lamp Light Bulbs Filament 220V UK

These vintage ST64 Industrial E27 4W LED bulbs offer 80% less energy consumption than standard bulbs and an extremely long life. Perfect for adding a touch of vintage flair to homes or businesses, they provide instant-on, warm white light without UV or IR radiation.

6 Pack 8W Vintage E27 base Filament LED Edison Bulb Dimmable Decorative

A 6-pack of vintage ST64 E27 8W LED bulbs designed for decorative illumination. These dimmable filament bulbs offer high energy efficiency and a long lifespan, creating a soft, warm white light ideal for various residential and commercial spaces like bars, hotels, and showrooms.

FAQs for ST64 Filament LED Bulbs

What is the difference between 4W and 8W ST64 E27 LED bulbs?

The wattage indicates the power consumption and, generally, the brightness output. A 4W ST64 LED bulb will provide ample decorative light and a soft glow, while an 8W version offers a brighter illumination, suitable for areas requiring more substantial lighting or a more pronounced decorative effect. Both are highly energy-efficient compared to old incandescent bulbs. For a brighter option, consider our 8W Dimmable E27 ST64 LED Bulbs.

Can these vintage filament LED bulbs replace my old incandescent bulbs?

Absolutely! These ST64 E27 LED bulbs are designed to be direct replacements for traditional incandescent bulbs with an E27 screw base. They offer the same classic look but with significantly lower energy consumption and a much longer lifespan, making them a cost-effective and environmentally friendly upgrade.

Are these bulbs truly dimmable, and what kind of dimmer do I need?

Yes, the dimmable ST64 LED bulbs in this collection are designed to work with compatible LED dimmers. We recommend using a trailing edge LED dimmer switch for optimal performance and to avoid flickering or buzzing. Always check the dimmer's compatibility specifications with LED lighting.

LED B22 Bayonet Bulbs (G80, T185, A60, 4W & 9W, Warm & Cool White)

Discover our versatile range of B22 Bayonet LED Bulbs, featuring classic shapes like G80, T185, and A60. These bulbs offer easy installation and come in various wattages (4W to 9W) and colour temperatures (Warm to Cool White) to suit diverse lighting needs. Whether you need a dimmable decorative bulb or a powerful energy-saving lamp, our B22 collection combines traditional bayonet fitting with advanced LED efficiency.

LED Filament Bulb G80 4W B22 Dimmable Bayonet Vintage Edison Bulb

Crafted from amber glass, this G80 vintage LED bulb with a B22 Bayonet base offers a decorative touch and a lifespan of up to 25,000 hours. Its 4W LED filament saves over 80% on electricity, providing 2700K warm white light, perfect for chandeliers and industrial fixtures.

Vintage LED Bayonet T185 Bulb 4W B22 Dimmable Decorative Bulb

This T185 B22 Bayonet 4W vintage LED bulb offers high energy efficiency and a long lifespan. With a 360-degree beam and smart IC chip, it delivers soft, warm white (amber 2200K) light, ideal for decorative applications in bars, hotels, and exhibition displays.

LED GLS 9W B22 Light Bulb A60 Energy Saving Lamp Warm White Globe

A 9W B22 A60 LED bulb that offers significant energy savings and a long lifespan of up to 25,000 hours. This warm white (3000K) globe bulb is perfect for creating a vintage feel or modern look in various indoor settings, delivering bright, high-quality light.

FAQs for B22 Bayonet LED Bulbs

What are the key benefits of choosing B22 LED bulbs?

B22 LED bulbs offer excellent energy efficiency, consuming significantly less power than traditional bulbs while providing comparable or superior light output. They also boast an exceptionally long lifespan, reducing the frequency and cost of replacements. Our range includes decorative options like the G80 4W B22 Dimmable Bayonet LED Bulb which combines aesthetic appeal with practical benefits.

Can I use a dimmable B22 LED bulb with a non-dimmable switch?

While a dimmable B22 LED bulb can often work in a standard on/off switch, its dimming capabilities will not function. For optimal performance and to utilize the dimming feature, it's essential to pair dimmable LED bulbs with a compatible LED dimmer switch.

How do I know which B22 bulb size (G80, T185, A60) is right for my fitting?

The bulb size primarily refers to its physical dimensions and shape. G80 (globe) and T185 (tubular) are often chosen for their decorative appeal where the bulb is visible, while A60 (standard GLS shape) is a common choice for general lighting. Always measure your fixture and consider the aesthetic you want to achieve before purchasing.

Specialty E27 Decorative LED Bulbs (G125 Music, Coloured Golf Ball, 3W & 4W, Dimmable/Non-Dimmable)

Add a unique touch to your lighting with our specialty E27 Decorative LED Bulbs. This exciting collection features truly distinctive designs, from the artistic G125 Music Filament bulb to vibrant coloured golf ball options. Perfect for creating focal points, accent lighting, or a festive atmosphere, these 3W and 4W bulbs blend creativity with the efficiency of LED technology.

Vintage LED E27 Bulb G125 4W Music Music Filament Screw Bulb Warm White

This Vintage LED E27 G125 Music Filament Bulb offers a unique "musical note" filament style, bringing a nostalgic glow and warm white light. It's a designer bulb that's perfect for creating a cozy, ambient atmosphere in homes, cafes, and stylish commercial spaces.

4W LED E27 Coloured Golf Ball Bulb Party Decor Lighting

A vibrant 4W E27 coloured golf ball LED bulb, perfect for party decor, festive decorations, and creating a lively atmosphere. With a 360° viewing angle and long lifespan of up to 20,000 hours, it's energy-efficient and easy to fit into existing E27 lamp holders.

Decorative LED E27 3W Outdoor Light Bulb Filament Style

These 3W LED filament bulbs with an E27 base boast 200 lumens of bright, mercury-free light. Their antique amber glass finish and retro design make them ideal for both home and commercial decorative illumination, creating a warm and dreamy moment in various settings.

FAQs for Specialty Decorative LED Bulbs

What makes the G125 Music Filament LED Bulb unique?

The G125 Music Filament LED Bulb stands out with its distinct 'musical note' shaped filament, offering a playful yet sophisticated touch. It's a perfect conversation starter and provides a warm white, ambient glow that adds character to any room or decorative fixture, combining art with efficient lighting.

Can coloured golf ball LED bulbs be used outdoors?

While many decorative bulbs are suitable for indoor use, some, like specific outdoor filament styles, can be used in appropriate outdoor-rated fixtures. Always check the product's specifications for its IP rating and suitability for outdoor environments to ensure safety and durability.

Are these specialty bulbs energy-efficient despite their decorative nature?

Yes, all specialty bulbs in this collection, including the coloured and filament designs, utilize LED technology. This means they are highly energy-efficient, consuming minimal power (e.g., 3W or 4W) compared to older bulb types, while still providing stunning visual appeal and light output.

Ready to Brighten Your World with LED Bulbs?

Discover our complete collection of high-quality, energy-efficient LED bulbs. From vintage charm to modern efficiency, find the perfect lighting solution for every space.

Explore Our Full LED Bulb Collection
